title: Die letzten Vier von Santa Cruz
writer: Josef Maria Frank, Werner Klingler, Alois Johannes Lippl
actors: Hermann Speelmans, Irene von Meyendorff, Valéry Inkijinoff
plot: An author, a businessman, a shipowner and a publisher form a business venture, which will supposedly exploit a huge find of lobsters on the island of Santa Cruz. After a report in the newspaper, the business' stocks do well. But t...
